since_last: 32% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.74%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.02% · Gold -0.60% · Nasdaq100 -0.97%. 32% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.74%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.74%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.99%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +5.79%, AAPL +4.07%, ORCL +3.55%, GOOGL +3.50%. Laggards: DELL -12.90%, MU -9.10%, AMBA -8.83%, MRVL -7.81%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.90% at $133.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.90% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
